title: Judicial Conduct Board Certification Deadlock — House Override

bottlenecks.summary: Judicial Conduct Board failed to certify whether the proposed impeachment articles are conduct-based and not based on the substance of judicial opinions by day 61 under Article IV Section 8.1.

satisfied_duties.duty: hold a full impeachment vote on the articles following the certification override
satisfied_duties.outcome: voted on the impeachment articles following the certification override; vote passed

failed_duties.duty: certify whether the proposed impeachment articles are conduct-based and not based on the substance of judicial opinions
failed_duties.outcome: Judicial Conduct Board failed to certify whether the proposed impeachment articles are conduct-based and not based on the substance of judicial opinions by day 61 under Article IV Section 8.1.

ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Judicial Conduct Board failed to certify whether the proposed impeachment articles are conduct-based and not based on the substance of judicial opinions by day 61 under Article IV Section 8.1.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
